name: Caramel Candy Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Walnuts, chopped; Or dry roasted peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Heat caramels and milk, stirring frequently, until smooth. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, mix flour, oats, brown sugar, baking soda, and salt.
4. Stir in egg and margarine with a fork until the mixture is crumbly.
5. Press half of the mixture into an ungreased 13 x 9-inch pan.
6. Bake for 10 minutes.
7. Sprinkle chocolate chips and walnuts (or peanuts) over the top.
8. Drizzle with caramel mixture.
9. Sprinkle remaining crumbly mix over the top.
10. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
11. Let cool for 30 minutes.
12. Cool completely before cutting into 48 bars.
